creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

There is a PR wanted to update all py-twisted ports to 9.0.0, the latest
twisted release.  Although the maintainer of devel/py-twisted is python@,
but you are the maintainer of rest py-twsted* ports, and devel/py-twisted
is just a meta-port, so I would like to ask your opinion of this update,
and how about take maintainership of the devel/py-twisted port?

Best,
	Li-Wen

-- 
Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu AT FreeBSD.org>
http://lwhsu.org
